metadata.description: Ground truth SOQL for 10 acceptance scenarios with pipeline diagnostics
notes: Each scenario maps NLS query → expected SOQL → validation criteria
SOQL validated against sandbox schema per HANDOFF-2025-12-10-SCHEMA-AUDIT
Cross-object queries require traversal from child to parent
v2.0: Added pipeline_checkpoints for root cause diagnosis

field_mapping_notes.property_address: ascendix__Street__c (use with City/State for full address)

pipeline_diagnostics.description: Each test captures queryPlan from API response to diagnose failures

checkpoints.validates: NLS → structured query with target entity and filters
checkpoints.failure_indicates: LLM decomposition failed or timed out to heuristic fallback

checkpoints.validates: Parent entity filtering and traversal to target
checkpoints.failure_indicates: Graph nodes missing attributes or filter value mismatch
Graph node attributes not indexed or value normalization issue
Entity linking failed or confidence below threshold

checkpoints.validates: Vector search executed with correct filters
checkpoints.failure_indicates: KB query failed or metadata filters not applied

wrong_city_returned.likely_cause: Cross-object filter returned 0 results, fell back to unfiltered vector search
wrong_city_returned.fix: Verify graph node has correct City attribute value

wrong_record_type.likely_cause: RecordType filter not extracted or value mismatch
wrong_record_type.fix: Check schema_decomposer LLM prompt includes RecordType options

empty_results.likely_cause: Graph filter short-circuited to empty (correct behavior if no matches)
empty_results.fix: Verify test data exists with correct attribute values

fallback_to_semantic.likely_cause: Both cross-object and graph filter failed
fallback_to_semantic.check: Look for 'falling back to pure semantic search' in logs
fallback_to_semantic.fix: Data indexing gap - reindex with correct attributes

scenarios.name: Available Class A office space in Plano
scenarios.nls_query: Available Class A office space in Plano

ground_truth_soql.description: First get Property IDs, then get Availabilities
ground_truth_soql.step1_property_filter: SELECT Id FROM ascendix__Property__c WHERE RecordType.Name = 'Office' AND ascendix__PropertyClass__c = 'A' AND ascendix__City__c = 'Plano'
ground_truth_soql.step2_availability_query: SELECT Id, Name, ascendix__Property__c, ascendix__AvailableArea__c, ascendix__Status__c FROM ascendix__Availability__c WHERE ascendix__Property__c IN (:propertyIds)

expected_data.description: From sandbox exploration: Preston Park Financial Center is Office in Plano

schema_decomposition.failure_action: Check LLM decomposition prompt and heuristic fallback

cross_object_query.failure_action: Verify Property graph nodes have City=Plano attribute

graph_filter.failure_action: Check graph node attribute indexing for City, PropertyClass, RecordType

result_validation.failure_action: Silent fallback to semantic search - check crossObjectQuery.matchingCount

rules: All returned records must be Availability objects
All related Property.ascendix__City__c must equal 'Plano'
All related Property.RecordType.Name must equal 'Office'
Results must NOT include records from other cities

scenarios.name: Available industrial properties in Miami FL 20k-50k sf
scenarios.nls_query: Available industrial properties in Miami, FL 20k-50k sf

ground_truth_soql.description: Filter Property by type/location, then Availability by size
ground_truth_soql.step1_property_filter: SELECT Id FROM ascendix__Property__c WHERE RecordType.Name = 'Industrial' AND ascendix__City__c = 'Miami' AND ascendix__State__c = 'FL'
ground_truth_soql.step2_availability_query: SELECT Id, Name, ascendix__Property__c, ascendix__AvailableArea__c FROM ascendix__Availability__c WHERE ascendix__Property__c IN (:propertyIds) AND ascendix__AvailableArea__c >= 20000 AND ascendix__AvailableArea__c <= 50000

expected_data.description: May return empty if no matching test data

cross_object_query.note: May return 0 if no Industrial properties in Miami - valid empty result

rules: All related Property.ascendix__City__c must equal 'Miami'
All related Property.ascendix__State__c must equal 'FL'
All related Property.RecordType.Name must equal 'Industrial'
All ascendix__AvailableArea__c must be between 20000 and 50000

scenarios.name: Class A office buildings downtown with vacancy
scenarios.nls_query: Class A office buildings downtown with vacancy >0

ground_truth_soql.description: Properties with Class A Office, downtown submarket, and at least one availability
ground_truth_soql.query: SELECT Id, Name, ascendix__City__c, ascendix__PropertyClass__c, ascendix__SubMarket__c, (SELECT Id FROM ascendix__Availabilities__r LIMIT 1) FROM ascendix__Property__c WHERE ascendix__PropertyClass__c = 'A' AND RecordType.Name = 'Office' AND ascendix__SubMarket__c LIKE '%Downtown%'

graph_filter.note: Direct Property filter - no cross-object traversal needed

aggregation_routing.note: May route to vacancy_view for vacancy >0 condition

rules: All ascendix__PropertyClass__c must equal 'A'
All RecordType.Name must equal 'Office'
All ascendix__SubMarket__c must contain 'Downtown'
Each property should have at least one availability OR vacancy > 0

ground_truth_soql.description: Leases with end date within 6 months from now
ground_truth_soql.query: SELECT Id, Name, ascendix__TermExpirationDate__c, ascendix__Property__c, ascendix__Tenant__c FROM ascendix__Lease__c WHERE ascendix__TermExpirationDate__c >= TODAY AND ascendix__TermExpirationDate__c <= NEXT_N_MONTHS:6

expected_data.description: Leases with end dates in the upcoming 6 month window

aggregation_routing.note: Should route to leases_view with temporal_parser date extraction

rules: All ascendix__TermExpirationDate__c must be >= today
All ascendix__TermExpirationDate__c must be <= today + 6 months
Results must be Lease objects

scenarios.name: Activities on Property 123 Main Street last 30 days
scenarios.nls_query: Activities on Property 123 Main Street last 30 days

ground_truth_soql.description: First resolve property by address, then get tasks
ground_truth_soql.step1_entity_resolution: SELECT Id FROM ascendix__Property__c WHERE Name LIKE '%123 Main Street%' OR ascendix__Street__c LIKE '%123 Main Street%'
ground_truth_soql.step2_activity_query: SELECT Id, Subject, WhatId, ActivityDate FROM Task WHERE WhatId = :resolvedPropertyId AND ActivityDate >= LAST_N_DAYS:30

expected_data.description: Requires property '123 Main Street' to exist in sandbox

schema_decomposition.note: Complex query requiring entity resolution before filtering

entity_resolution.failure_action: Property '123 Main Street' may not exist - seed test data

planner.note: Planner should resolve quoted entity to seed IDs

rules: Entity resolution must successfully find property
All Task.WhatId must match resolved property ID
All ActivityDate must be within last 30 days

scenarios.name: Contacts with 5+ activities and Sale in Negotiation
scenarios.nls_query: Contacts with ≥5 activities last week and Sale stage=Negotiation

ground_truth_soql.description: Complex query requiring activities_agg derived view
ground_truth_soql.sale_filter: SELECT ascendix__Contact__c FROM ascendix__Sale__c WHERE ascendix__Stage__c = 'Negotiation'
ground_truth_soql.combined_logic: Intersection of contacts with high activity AND related to Negotiation stage sales

aggregation_routing.failure_action: Verify activities_agg view exists and is populated

rules: Must use activities_agg view (not runtime aggregation)
Activity count must be >= 5 in last 7 days
Contact must be related to a Sale with Stage = 'Negotiation'

scenarios.name: Sales where Broker is Jane Doe and Stage is Due Diligence
scenarios.nls_query: Sales where Broker=Jane Doe and Stage=Due Diligence

ground_truth_soql.description: First resolve contact by name, then filter sales
ground_truth_soql.step1_entity_resolution: SELECT Id FROM Contact WHERE Name LIKE '%Jane Doe%'
ground_truth_soql.step2_sale_query: SELECT Id, Name, ascendix__Stage__c, ascendix__Broker__c FROM ascendix__Sale__c WHERE ascendix__Broker__c = :resolvedContactId AND ascendix__Stage__c = 'Due Diligence'

expected_data.description: Requires Contact 'Jane Doe' to exist in sandbox

entity_resolution.failure_action: Contact 'Jane Doe' may not exist - seed test data

rules: Entity resolution must successfully find contact 'Jane Doe'
All Sale.ascendix__Broker__c must match resolved contact ID
All Sale.ascendix__Stage__c must equal 'Due Diligence'

scenarios.name: Companies owning 10+ retail properties in PNW
scenarios.nls_query: Companies owning ≥10 retail properties in PNW

ground_truth_soql.description: Complex aggregation requiring derived property counts
ground_truth_soql.property_filter: SELECT ascendix__Owner__c, COUNT(Id) FROM ascendix__Property__c WHERE RecordType.Name = 'Retail' AND ascendix__State__c IN ('Washington', 'Oregon', 'Idaho', 'WA', 'OR', 'ID') GROUP BY ascendix__Owner__c HAVING COUNT(Id) >= 10
ground_truth_soql.account_lookup: SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Id IN (:ownerIds)

expected_data.description: Companies with significant retail holdings in Pacific Northwest

schema_decomposition.note: Complex aggregation query requiring geographic expansion

geographic_expansion.failure_action: Check if geographic aliases are configured

aggregation_routing.note: May require property_counts derived view or runtime aggregation

result_validation.post_validation_required: Verify each Account owns >= 10 Retail properties in PNW

rules: Must use derived property counts (not runtime aggregation)
All counted properties must be Retail type
All counted properties must be in WA, OR, or ID
Each returned company must own >= 10 qualifying properties

scenarios.name: Properties with vacancy rate greater than 25%

ground_truth_soql.derived_view_query: Query vacancy_view for properties with vacancy_pct > 25
ground_truth_soql.property_lookup: SELECT Id, Name, ascendix__TotalBuildingArea__c, ascendix__TotalAvailableArea__c FROM ascendix__Property__c WHERE Id IN (:vacantPropertyIds)

schema_decomposition.note: Numeric comparison query on derived metric

aggregation_routing.failure_action: Verify vacancy_view exists and is populated with vacancy_pct

rules: Must use vacancy_view (not runtime calculation)
All returned properties must have vacancy_rate > 25%
Vacancy calculation: ascendix__TotalAvailableArea__c / ascendix__TotalBuildingArea__c

scenarios.name: Notes containing HVAC system needs replacement
scenarios.nls_query: Notes containing HVAC system needs replacement

ground_truth_soql.query: SELECT Id, Title, Body, ParentId FROM Note WHERE Body LIKE '%HVAC%' AND Body LIKE '%replacement%'

intent_classification.note: Text search should route to vector/semantic search

result_validation.failure_action: Note records with HVAC content may not exist - seed test data

rules: All returned Note.Body must contain 'HVAC'
All returned Note.Body must reference maintenance/replacement
Should return linked parent IDs for context

api_endpoint.note: Set debug:true in request to get full queryPlan in response

for_each_test: 1. Execute NLS query via AI Search LWC (or direct API with debug:true)
2. Capture full API response including queryPlan
3. Validate pipeline checkpoints against expected values
4. If checkpoint fails, identify root cause from failure_action
5. Execute ground truth SOQL directly in Salesforce
6. Compare RAG results against SOQL results
7. Validate all returned records meet criteria
checkpoint_validation_order: schema_decomposition - Did NLS correctly decompose to structured query?
cross_object_query - Did parent entity filtering work?
graph_filter - Did attribute filtering return candidates?
planner - Did entity linking produce predicates?
aggregation_routing - Did it route to correct derived view?
result_validation - Do returned records meet criteria?

wrong_data_returned: Check queryPlan.crossObjectQuery.matchingCount - if 0, cross-object filter failed
Check queryPlan.graphFilterCandidates - if 0, graph attributes may be missing
Look for 'falling back to pure semantic search' in queryPlan warnings
empty_results: Check queryPlan.graphFilterShortCircuit - if true, correct empty response
Check queryPlan.schemaDecomposition.confidence - low confidence may skip filtering
Verify test data exists with correct attribute values
timeout_or_error: Check trace.decompositionMs and trace.retrieveMs for latency issues

verified_data: GAZC-R14-AC1: Preston Park Financial Center (Office, Plano) with availabilities
temporal_test_data: GAZC-R14-AC4: Leases with end dates in next 6 months
